source_name: Deterministic synthetic sub-pixel artifact hard-negative generator
instrument: Synthetic ZTF-like 63x63 cutout generator; no physical instrument
cadence: One deterministic synthetic triplet per index, generated from numpy seed=(0 + index); 3000 total samples
band_or_frequency: Synthetic ZTF-like science/reference/difference image triplets; no calibrated passband
data_product_type: On-the-fly synthetic stellar_artifact hard-negative cutout triplets
downloaded_at: not-downloaded; generated in memory during the 2026-07-12 tier2_cnn_v4 training run

checksum.value: no-persisted-payload; deterministic generator parameters are n=3000, seed=0, sigma_px=[0.05,0.35], mag=[18,21], background=[2,40]

license: Project-generated synthetic data; repository license applies
label_source: Generator construction: every sample is explicitly labeled stellar_artifact
preprocessing_version: Skills/train_tier2_cnn.py::SyntheticArtifactDataset plus Skills/evaluate_cnn_false_discovery.py::_synthesize_artifact_cutout_arrays at commit 637ab9c6; n=3000, seed=0, sigma range 0.05-0.35 px
known_caveats: Samples were generated on the fly and were not persisted, so there is no payload checksum; reproducibility depends on the cited code revision and generator parameters.
This synthetic dataset supplements 58,500 real training rows and never enters validation or test splits.

The sigma range deliberately brackets the 0.15 px adversarial artifact used by Skills/evaluate_cnn_false_discovery.py; success on that test family is therefore not independent evidence of general artifact robustness.
The real-data training source remains separately documented by data_selection/dataset_manifests/ztf_labeled_alerts_tier2_cnn_v3.json.
